calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Reid Steinfeld of Persolve, LLC telephone number 818-534-3109 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Persolve, LLC.
Defendant Karen Ma telephone number 415-706-2326 in Propria Persona.

Ms. Ma presented documents regarding social security benefits and the worker's compensation award. Ms. Ma also provided information regarding the contents in the safe deposit box. Mr. Steinfeld presented oral argument. Defendant Karen Ma's Claim Of Exemption is granted. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the Judgment Debtor. Order signed.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Off Calendar
